name: SCC_CreateMeteringReceiptResAC_DIN
title: SCC_CreateMeteringReceiptResAC_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateMeteringReceiptResAC_DIN ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, byte StatusFlags[], char Notification[] )
description: Creates a Metering Receipt Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
